'''Jolee''' was the daughter of the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Dorin Se'ol]] and his wife [[Vorena]], and was born on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Volik]] during the early years of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The waterfall [[Jolee Falls]] was named after her.

==Biography==
{{RPGseed}}
Jolee once boarded a [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]] that stopped briefly on Volik, so Master Se'ol sent a group of his students to find her and bring her back home. However, their rescue was made more complicated when the merchant ship Jolee was on was attacked by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]].<ref name="TUR" />
{{Endgame}}
